pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh both define this target path.
Task description and export_result.sh both define this target path.
setup_task.sh creates this directory and writes the video files to it.
setup_task.sh generates these three exact video files.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an experiment at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/emotion_task/emotion_rating.psyexp and a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/emotion_task/video_conditions.csv. Three synthetic video files (joy.mp4, sadness.mp4, neutral.mp4) are generated during setup in /home/ga/assets/videos, which must be used as the assets.
